retry_reason: The operation is a one-time cleanup; if the handler is already freed (flag false), retrying is unnecessary and harmful (double-free risk).
contract_summary: This function is a cleanup (put) wrapper that releases the v4l2_ctrl_handler associated with a bdisp_ctx if it was previously initialized (indicated by ctx->ctrls_rdy). After the call, the handler is freed and the flag is cleared; the caller must not use the handler afterward. It is typically called during context destruction or when overriding controls. Errors are not possible; the function is safe to call multiple times as long as ctrls_rdy reflects the actual state.
